name: the sync records a resumable ledger entry per source with the processed content hash
command:
mkdir -p state
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/universal-coverage-sync.sh --state-dir state --ledger l.jsonl --no-promote --now 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
grep -q '"source":"owasp-asvs"' l.jsonl && grep -q 'content_hash' l.jsonl && echo ledger-recorded 1>&2
